who we are

From a Greek kitchen table to Norwich Market

Our story

Go Crepes started the way most good things do — around a family table. Recipes for flaky spanakopita, syrup-soaked revani and charcoal souvlaki passed down from a grandmother in Greece, cooked for anyone who happened to be hungry.

When we set up our stall on Norwich Market, the idea was simple: bring those flavours to the people of Norfolk, cooked properly and cooked in front of you. No microwaves, no shortcuts — just a hot griddle, real ingredients and a bit of Greek soul.

Today we fold hundreds of crepes a week, sweet and savoury, alongside a full spread of Greek street food. Same family, same recipes, same promise on the sign above the stall — taste the difference.

what we stand for

Three simple rules

01

Real ingredients

Proper cheese, fresh herbs, marinated meat and real Nutella. If we wouldn't feed it to our own family, it doesn't go on the griddle.

02

Made to order

Nothing sits under a lamp. Every crepe is poured, filled and folded the moment you order it — that's why there's steam on the griddle all day.

03

Greek soul

Big flavours, bigger portions and a warm welcome. We want the market to feel a little more like a Greek high street.

from batter to bite

How your crepe happens

1. Poured

Fresh batter spread thin across the hot plate and swirled by hand until golden and lacy at the edges.

2. Loaded

Piled high with your fillings — melting cheese, ham and spinach, or Nutella and banana for the sweet tooth.

3. Folded & served

Folded, finished with a flourish and handed over hot. Two minutes, start to finish. That's street food done right.

come say hello

You'll find us at Stall 5, Norwich Market

Right in the heart of the city under the famous striped roofs, a two-minute walk from the Guildhall and City Hall. Open every day.

Getting here

🚶 On foot: Under the striped stalls between Gentleman's Walk and City Hall — look for the yellow & black sign.
🚌 By bus: 2 min from Castle Meadow & St Stephens Street stops.
🅿️ Parking: St Giles, The Forum & Castle Quarter car parks all within 5 min.
🏛️ Landmarks: Beside the Guildhall, opposite the Royal Arcade.
